ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Final Accounting Of Former Administrator
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cynthia Lee for Yong Hong Fan, Executor (via Zoom).
Amy Harrington for Cheryl Hom, Former Administrator (via Zoom).

Ms. Harrington apologized for missing the prior hearing and reported that a final accounting had been filed the previous week, along with a last inventory item. She confirmed her client is arranging to turn over a small amount of money to the new executor.

Ms. Lee explained that her client has applied for letters from the court and sent inventory details to the probate referee. Ms. Lee informed the court that she had concerns that the estate might not close by the current termination date of April 15, 2025, and requested an extension to June 15, 2025. The court agreed to extend the termination date to June 17, 2025.

The order to appear as well as the status hearing were both taken off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cynthia Lee for Yong Hong Fan, Proposed Executor (via Zoom).
Yong Hong Fan, present in court.

Ms. Lee informed the court that previous administrator Cheryl Hom and her counsel, Ms. Amy Harrington, have no objections to the appointment of Yong Hong Fan. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 20, 2021, is admitted to probate. Yong Hong Fan is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Karen Ann Simons remains the appointed probate referee. The court confirmed the existing status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration, which will remain set for April 15, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

The court was informed that the estate consists primarily of one property, which will likely be sold under probate administration to address the estate's debts.

The court set a status hearing for the final accounting of the former administrator, Cheryl Hom, for January 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The court shall issue to Ms. Amy Harrington an Order to Appear for this hearing.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
